sentences.arabic: تَذْهَبُ سُوزَانُ إِلَى الْعَمَلِ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ بِالْحَافِلَةِ.
sentences.translation: Suzan ide na posao autobusom svaki dan.
sentences.translationEn: Suzan goes to work by bus every day.

sentences.arabic: تَسْتَغْرِقُ الرِّحْلَةُ عِشْرِينَ دَقِيقَةً مِنَ الْبَيْتِ.
sentences.translation: Putovanje traje dvadeset minuta od kuće.
sentences.translationEn: The trip takes twenty minutes from home.

sentences.arabic: تَقْرَأُ كِتَابًا أَوْ تَسْتَمِعُ إِلَى الْمُوسِيقَى فِي الطَّرِيقِ.
sentences.translation: Čita knjigu ili sluša muziku na putu.
sentences.translationEn: She reads a book or listens to music on the way.

sentences.arabic: تَصِلُ إِلَى الْعَمَلِ نَشِيطَةً وَمُسْتَعِدَّةً لِلْيَوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Stiže na posao svježa i spremna za dan.
sentences.translationEn: She arrives at work energetic and ready for the day.
